identity.mission: Create a premium, dark-mode, high-performance CRM and Gamification system for Faculty/Fakulti Laboratorios.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Scientific Precision' with 'Organic Wellness'.
Emotion First: Every interaction must feel 'Premium' and 'Trusted'.
Content is King: Data is the hero. Funnels are the story.
Negative Space: Use deep blacks to let the neon green data pop.
Contrast: High contrast text for readability in dark mode.

primary.description: Tailwind Lime-400/300. Used for CTAs, Active States, and Key Metrics.

secondary.description: Deep Organic Green. Used for backgrounds of active items or subtle borders.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black hover:bg-primary/90 font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(163,230,53,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-white hover:bg-zinc-700 font-medium rounded-full px-6 py-2 border border-zinc-700
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.default: bg-card border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:border-primary/30 transition-colors duration-300
cards.highlight: bg-gradient-to-br from-zinc-900 to-black border border-primary/20 rounded-2xl relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-zinc-900/50 border-zinc-800 focus:border-primary/50 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 rounded-lg h-12

rules: Use distinct colors for each stage (defined in colors.status.funnel_stages).
Connect stages with smooth curves or chevron arrows.

games.general: Mobile-first, immersive, full-screen overlays on mobile.

roulette.animation: Smooth easing with confetti explosion on win.

mystery_box.animation: Hover float, shake on click, open with light ray emission.

chatbot.avatar: Minimalist geometric robot face or just the brand 'F' logo glowing.

assets.icons_library: Lucide React (Default) + Phosphor Icons (for Games/Premium feel)

rules: Ensure text on primary color is Black (for contrast).
Do not use color alone to convey funnel stage status (use icons/labels).
Focus states must have a high-contrast ring (white or primary).

do_not_use: Rounded-xl for everything (Use full rounded for buttons, rounded-2xl for cards)
must_do: Use data-testid on all interactive elements.
Implement error boundaries for Games components.
